title: Needs No Weapon
summary: Powerful punches, kicks, elbows, knees, and full body movements are all the weapons you need.
tiers: Tier 3: Moving Like Water or Greater Enhanced Potential
Tier 6: Master of Unarmed Fighting Style or Lethal Damage
gm_intrusions: Striking certain foes hurts you as much as it hurts them. Opponents with weapons have greater reach. Complicated martial arts moves can knock you off balance.
text: Powerful punches, kicks, elbows, knees, and full body movements are all the weapons you need.
details: Powerful punches, kicks, elbows, knees, and full body movements are all the weapons you need.
